rows.description: Mynn (now Sayer) pro Anno ad Mic. 1747. & Capon
rows.notes: Combined best from both. Description largely from gpt-5-mini for correctness of 'Anno', '1747.', and '& Capon', and the closing parenthesis after 'Sayer', with 'et' corrected to '&'. Amounts and half-penny fraction from gemini-flash.
